creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to z_axis from comment #8)

Could you please provide the screenshot (image) ?

Also, it seems like there has been confusion in jrm's replies, as '-q', and '-Q' aren't quite same. 

Could you try 'emacs -Q' switch which also excludes all of the system's site-lisp files (in addition to what is excluded by emacs -q), so we can confirm that what you're experiencing is indeed something with 'emacs' port, i.e.

  $ env LC_ALL=C emacs -Q

Thanks
